title: Settings
description: Manage your Majlis experience, privacy, and communication preferences.
saveError: Failed to save your setting. Your previous choice was restored.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose how Majlis looks and which language it uses.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Use a light theme, dark theme, or follow your device setting.

language.label: Language
language.description: Select the language used throughout the application.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Control what other members can see about you.

privateProfile.label: Private profile
privateProfile.description: Only friends can see your posts and complete profile information.

showEmail.label: Show email address
showEmail.description: Allow your email address to appear where the backend permits it.

friendRequests.title: Friend Requests
friendRequests.description: Decide whether other members can connect with you.

allow.label: Allow friend requests
allow.description: When disabled, new friend requests to your account are rejected.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Control whether Majlis creates and sends notifications for your account.

enabled.label: Enable notifications
enabled.description: Receive notifications for supported activity involving your account.
